title: Create more packages
description: simple addon that adds even more packages into create mod
body:
## About:
Create more packages is a small create addon that adds over 30 new cardboard packages, new packages working are the same as standard Create packages.

### content
All new packages:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfda4bf6dd2828333f70609db05c0ecd7fbe90b7.png)
